1.title: Introducing GPT-5.5
1.quote: GPT-5.5 is OpenAI's smartest and most intuitive model yet, designed to understand what you're trying to do faster and carry more of the work itself.

2.title: Introducing Workspace Agents in ChatGPT
2.quote: Workspace agents are shared, cloud-based AI agents that handle complex, long-running workflows across your organization and keep running even after you close your laptop.

4.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.7
4.quote: Claude Opus 4.7 is a notable improvement on Opus 4.6 in advanced software engineering, with particular gains on the most difficult tasks.

5.title: Introducing Claude for Education
5.quote: A specialized version of Claude tailored for higher education institutions.

6.title: Claude for education
6.quote: Claude helps universities maintain academic integrity while incorporating AI tools in education.

7.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro: A smarter model for your most complex tasks
7.quote: Gemini 3.1 Pro is designed for tasks where a simple answer isn't enough.

8.title: New Workspace Intelligence delivers unified, real-time understanding to power agentic work
8.quote: Workspace Intelligence delivers unified, real-time understanding to power agentic work.

9.title: Google for Education
9.quote: We provide teachers with helpful, research-backed tools to create meaningful learning experiences, driven by human connection.

10.title: Gemini for Education: How higher education is using Google AI
10.quote: More than 1000 higher education institutions are using Gemini for Education, reaching over 10 million college students across the United States.

11.title: The Wharton School makes strategic investment in artificial intelligence research and teaching
11.quote: The Wharton School announced a major investment to drastically scale its research and teaching capabilities in artificial intelligence and data science.

12.title: Oxford becomes first UK university to offer ChatGPT Edu to all staff and students
12.quote: Oxford has become the first university in the UK to provide free ChatGPT Edu access to all staff and students, starting the 2025-26 academic year.

13.title: UCLA is set to introduce ChatGPT Enterprise on campus
13.quote: UCLA is the first university in California to incorporate OpenAI's ChatGPT Enterprise into its operations.

14.title: CSU announces landmark initiative to become nation's first and largest AI-empowered university system

15.title: Inside Cal State's big $17 million bet on ChatGPT for all
15.quote: California State University will make OpenAI's ChatGPT available to nearly half a million students and faculty across its 23 campuses for $17 million.

16.title: Northeastern and Anthropic to lead in responsible AI innovation in higher education
16.quote: The partnership will help transform teaching, research and business operations across Northeastern's global enterprise.

17.title: Anthropic's Claude for Education
17.quote: Claude for Education is now accessible for LSE educators, free of charge.

18.title: Champlain College collaborates with Anthropic to advance AI in higher ed
18.quote: Champlain College and Anthropic announced a strategic collaboration to leverage Claude to advance AI in higher education and workforce development.

19.title: Rice adopts Google's generative AI solution to enhance student learning and faculty support
19.quote: Rice University has partnered with Google for Education to adopt Gemini for Education to provide students, faculty and staff with powerful, responsible AI tools.

20.title: University of Houston launches Google Gemini for Education to advance AI research and student success
20.quote: The University of Houston has partnered with Google to provide Gemini for Education and NotebookLM to all students, faculty and staff.

21.title: AI education for high school students
21.quote: Crafting Tomorrow provides AI education designed for high school students.

22.title: How Babson students use AI
22.quote: Students have moved far beyond using AI as a simple shortcut to finish homework.

23.title: AI x Body & Mind
23.quote: The Generator Build-a-thon is Babson College's flagship hackathon — a 12-hour sprint where 500 students from across Boston-area universities build AI-powered solutions.

25.title: Base44 for higher education
25.quote: Help the next generation create and innovate by joining our global network of university partners.

27.title: Babson and Microsoft team up to help small businesses with AI
27.quote: About 30 Babson students who are part of The Generator, the College's interdisciplinary AI lab, met up at the Microsoft Garage in Cambridge, Massachusetts.

28.title: Arizona State University collaboration with OpenAI charts the future of AI in higher education
28.quote: Arizona State University announced an exclusive collaboration with OpenAI, becoming the first higher education institution to leverage ChatGPT Enterprise to enhance student success, forge new avenues for innovative research and streamline organizational processes.

29.title: Duke expands suite of secure, Duke-managed AI services with OpenAI
29.quote: Duke is among the first universities to expand AI access to the entire campus community through ChatGPT and the DukeGPT platform.

30.title: Vanderbilt expands multi-tool AI strategy with ChatGPT Edu, Amplify 2.0 and more
30.quote: Vanderbilt is expanding its multi-tool AI strategy, providing all students, faculty and staff with access to ChatGPT Edu alongside the university's homegrown Amplify platform.

31.title: Harvard FAS will transition from ChatGPT Edu to Anthropic's Claude
31.quote: Harvard's Faculty of Arts and Sciences will transition from ChatGPT Edu to Anthropic's Claude beginning in the fall, with access granted on a course-by-course basis.
